# Ternary Operator

Ternary conditional operator

```perl
$result = $condition ? $true_value : $false_value;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$result = $condition ? $true_value : $false_value;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = $condition ? $true_value : $false_value;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
